shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-hook-form async validation stale isValid isValidating resolver out-of-order" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '190,275p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '540,750p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1160,1260p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1430,1495p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1600,1660p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1930,1980p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; rg -n \"isValidating|isValid\" src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx | head -100"
/bin/bash -lc "git log --oneline -8 && git remote -v && sed -n '1,220p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && rg -n \"_setValid\\(\" src/logic/createFormControl.ts src/useForm.ts src/useFieldArray.ts"

/bin/bash -lc 'git branch -a --contains HEAD; git tag --points-at HEAD; curl -L --max-time 10 -s https://raw.githubusercontent.com/react-hook-form/react-hook-form/master/src/logic/createFormControl.ts | rg -n -C 8 "_setValid|_updateIsValidating|_runSchema" | head -180'
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff -- src/logic/createFormControl.ts && node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --pretty false'
